events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: residential panelboard installation & makeup, rough-complete, observed condition: missing knockout filler. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Need apply NEC Art. 408, 110.26, 200.4. Missing knockout filler means open knockout holes in panelboard enclosure where no conduit/cable enters, leaving openings. This is a defect: violates enclosure integrity, can allow foreign objects, pests, accidental contact, violates 408.7? Actually NEC 408.7 requires unused openings for switches and overcurrent devices to be closed. Also 110.12 mechanical execution, 312.5 maybe. Working clearance 110.26 not directly. 200.4 about terminal identification? Not relevant. So decision fail, risk medium maybe high? Missing knockout filler in energized panel? At rough-complete maybe not energized. But defect is non-compliant. Component condition installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 80. Findings: open knockout holes in panelboard enclosure; missing closure plugs/fillers; breach of enclosure integrity. Actions: install listed knockout fillers/seals for all unused openings per manufacturer and NEC 408.7; inspect all knockouts. Rationale. references: NEC 408.7 (unused openings), 110.12, maybe 110.26 not directly. But required references list includes Art. 408, 110.26, 200.4. We can include them but note 408.7. The instruction says apply rather than quote mechanically. Use references array. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.
